source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH HolidayTable AS (
    SELECT 'Home Org' AS Division, CAST('2025-01-01' AS DATE) AS Holiday UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Home Org', CAST('2025-07-04' AS DATE) UNION ALL
	SELECT 'Home Org', CAST('2025-05-26' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Home Org', CAST('2025-12-25' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Home Org', CAST('2025-11-27' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'FHIA', CAST('2025-01-01' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'FHIA', CAST('2025-07-04' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'FHIA', CAST('2025-11-27' AS DATE) UNION ALL
	SELECT 'FHIA', CAST('2025-12-25' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Mad City', CAST('2025-12-25' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Mad City', CAST('2025-01-01' AS DATE) UNION ALL
	SELECT 'Mad City', CAST('2025-11-27' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'State Wide', CAST('2025-12-25' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'State Wide', CAST('2025-11-27' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Max Home', CAST('2025-01-01' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Max Home', CAST('2025-04-20' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Max Home', CAST('2025-05-26' AS DATE) UNION ALL
	SELECT 'Max Home', CAST('2025-07-04' AS DATE) UNION ALL
	SELECT 'Max Home', CAST('2025-09-01' AS DATE) UNION ALL
	SELECT 'Max Home', CAST('2025-11-27' AS DATE) UNION ALL
	SELECT 'Max Home', CAST('2025-12-25' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Pacific Bath', CAST('2025-07-04' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Pacific Bath', CAST('2025-11-27' AS DATE) UNION ALL
	SELECT 'Pacific Bath', CAST('2025-12-24' AS DATE) UNION ALL
	SELECT 'Pacific Bath', CAST('2025-12-25' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Rite Window', CAST('2025-01-01' AS DATE) UNION ALL
	SELECT 'Rite Window', CAST('2025-05-26' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Rite Window', CAST('2025-07-04' AS DATE) UNION ALL
	SELECT 'Rite Window', CAST('2025-09-01' AS DATE) UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Rite Window', CAST('2025-11-27' AS DATE) UNION ALL
	SELECT 'Rite Window', CAST('2025-12-25' AS DATE)
),

RankedLeads AS (
    SELECT 
    l.LeadID,
    l.CustomerID,

    -- Manually adjusting LeadEntryDate to EST based on Division
    CASE 
        WHEN l.Division IN ('MAC', 'MXH', 'SWR') 
            THEN FORMAT(DATEADD(HOUR, 1, COALESCE(l.DateReceived, l.DateEntered)), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')
        WHEN l.Division = 'PBC' 
            THEN FORMAT(DATEADD(HOUR, 3, COALESCE(l.DateReceived, l.DateEntered)), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')
        ELSE 
            FORMAT(COALESCE(l.DateReceived, l.DateEntered), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')
    END AS LeadEntryDate,

    l.Division,
    c.CleanedPhone,

    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY c.CleanedPhone, l.Division 
        ORDER BY 
            CASE 
                WHEN l.Division IN ('MAC', 'MXH', 'SWR') 
                    THEN FORMAT(DATEADD(HOUR, 1, COALESCE(l.DateReceived, l.DateEntered)), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')
                WHEN l.Division = 'PBC' 
                    THEN FORMAT(DATEADD(HOUR, 3, COALESCE(l.DateReceived, l.DateEntered)), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')
                ELSE 
                    FORMAT(COALESCE(l.DateReceived, l.DateEntered), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')
            END
    ) AS LeadRank

FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD l
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(Phone, '+', ''), '-', ''), '(', ''), ')', ''), ' ', ''), '?', '') AS CleanedPhone
    FROM EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER
) c ON l.CustomerID = c.CustomerID

WHERE 
    CAST(COALESCE(l.DateReceived, l.DateEntered) AS DATE) >= '2025-01-01'
    AND c.CleanedPhone IS NOT NULL
    AND LEN(c.CleanedPhone) = 10
    AND ISNUMERIC(c.CleanedPhone) = 1 
    --AND c.CleanedPhone IN ('8507552485','7122357167','5633799007','2522921586','9196324230','2033682665','9545592689')
),

LeadBoundaries AS (
    SELECT 
        rl.LeadID,
        rl.CustomerID,
        rl.LeadEntryDate,
        rl.Division,
        rl.CleanedPhone,
        rl.LeadRank,
        LEAD(rl.LeadEntryDate) OVER (
            PARTITION BY rl.CleanedPhone, rl.Division 
            ORDER BY rl.LeadEntryDate
        ) AS NextLeadEntryDate
    FROM RankedLeads rl
),

CallData AS (
    SELECT 
        lb.LeadID,
        lb.CustomerID,
        lb.LeadEntryDate,
        lb.NextLeadEntryDate,
        lb.Division,
        lb.CleanedPhone,
        FORMAT(CAST(f.[DATE] AS DATETIME) + CAST(ISNULL(COALESCE(CAST(f.[TIME] AS TIME), CAST(f.[HOUR] AS TIME)), '00:00:00') AS DATETIME), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS CallDateTime,
        d.CallResult,
        f.Call_Type,
        f.Contact_ID,
        d.AnsweredCall AS Answered
    FROM LeadBoundaries lb
    JOIN EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL_NEW f 
        ON f.Number1 = lb.CleanedPhone AND f.Division = lb.Division
    LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_FIVE9_CALL_RESULT_DISPOSITION d 
        ON f.CallResultID = d.CallResultId
    WHERE 
        FORMAT(CAST(f.[DATE] AS DATETIME) + CAST(ISNULL(COALESCE(CAST(f.[TIME] AS TIME), CAST(f.[HOUR] AS TIME)), '00:00:00') AS DATETIME), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') >= lb.LeadEntryDate
        AND (
            lb.NextLeadEntryDate IS NULL 
            OR FORMAT(CAST(f.[DATE] AS DATETIME) + 
                CAST(ISNULL(COALESCE(CAST(f.[TIME] AS TIME), CAST(f.[HOUR] AS TIME)), '00:00:00') AS DATETIME), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') < lb.NextLeadEntryDate
        ) --and f.Number1 IN ('8507552485','7122357167','5633799007','2522921586','9196324230','2033682665','9545592689')
),

FirstAnswerInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        LeadID,
        MIN(CallDateTime) AS FirstAnsweredTime
    FROM CallData
    WHERE Answered = 1
    GROUP BY LeadID
),

FirstCallInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        LeadID,
        MIN(CallDateTime) AS FirstCallTime
    FROM CallData
    GROUP BY LeadID
),

FirstCallDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        cd.LeadID,
        cd.CallDateTime AS FirstCallTime,
        cd.Call_Type AS FirstCallType,
        cd.Contact_ID AS FirstCallContactID
    FROM CallData cd
    JOIN (
        SELECT LeadID, MIN(CallDateTime) AS FirstCallTime
        FROM CallData
        GROUP BY LeadID
    ) fc ON cd.LeadID = fc.LeadID AND cd.CallDateTime = fc.FirstCallTime
),

CallBuckets AS (
    SELECT 
        cd.LeadID,
        cd.CustomerID,
        cd.CleanedPhone,
        cd.Division,
        cd.LeadEntryDate,
        cd.CallDateTime,
        cd.Call_Type,
        cd.Contact_ID,
        cd.Answered,
        fa.FirstAnsweredTime,
        DATEDIFF(SECOND, cd.LeadEntryDate, fa.FirstAnsweredTime) AS AnsweredAgeIncludingHolidays,
        CASE 
            WHEN fa.FirstAnsweredTime IS NULL THEN 'No Answered Call'
            WHEN DATEDIFF(HOUR, cd.LeadEntryDate, fa.FirstAnsweredTime) -
                (SELECT COUNT(*) * 24 
                 FROM HolidayTable ht
                 WHERE ht.Division = cd.Division 
                   AND ht.Holiday BETWEEN CAST(cd.LeadEntryDate AS DATE) AND CAST(fa.FirstAnsweredTime AS DATE)) < 24 THEN 'Under24'
            WHEN DATEDIFF(HOUR, cd.LeadEntryDate, fa.FirstAnsweredTime) -
                (SELECT COUNT(*) * 24 
                 FROM HolidayTable ht
                 WHERE ht.Division = cd.Division 
                   AND ht.Holiday BETWEEN CAST(cd.LeadEntryDate AS DATE) AND CAST(fa.FirstAnsweredTime AS DATE)) < 48 THEN '24to48'
            WHEN DATEDIFF(HOUR, cd.LeadEntryDate, fa.FirstAnsweredTime) -
                (SELECT COUNT(*) * 24 
                 FROM HolidayTable ht
                 WHERE ht.Division = cd.Division 
                   AND ht.Holiday BETWEEN CAST(cd.LeadEntryDate AS DATE) AND CAST(fa.FirstAnsweredTime AS DATE)) < 72 THEN '48to72'
            ELSE 'Over72'
        END AS ContactBucket
    FROM CallData cd
    LEFT JOIN FirstAnswerInfo fa ON cd.LeadID = fa.LeadID
),

FilteredCalls AS (
    SELECT *,
        CASE 
            WHEN ContactBucket = 'Under24' AND CallDateTime <= FirstAnsweredTime THEN 1
            WHEN ContactBucket = '24to48' AND CallDateTime >= DATEADD(HOUR, 24, LeadEntryDate) AND CallDateTime < DATEADD(HOUR, 48, LeadEntryDate) AND CallDateTime <= FirstAnsweredTime THEN 1
            WHEN ContactBucket = '48to72' AND CallDateTime >= DATEADD(HOUR, 48, LeadEntryDate) AND CallDateTime < DATEADD(HOUR, 72, LeadEntryDate) AND CallDateTime <= FirstAnsweredTime THEN 1
            WHEN ContactBucket = 'Over72' AND CallDateTime >= DATEADD(HOUR, 72, LeadEntryDate) AND CallDateTime <= FirstAnsweredTime THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS CountableCall
    FROM CallBuckets
),

FilteredCallsWithHoliday AS (
    SELECT 
        fc.*,
        fcd.FirstCallType,
        fcd.FirstCallContactID,
        fcd.FirstCallTime,
        DATEDIFF(SECOND, fc.LeadEntryDate, fcd.FirstCallTime) AS FirstCallAgeIncludingHolidays,
        DATEDIFF(SECOND, fc.LeadEntryDate, fcd.FirstCallTime) -
            (SELECT COUNT(*) * 24 * 60 * 60
             FROM HolidayTable ht
             WHERE ht.Division = fc.Division 
               AND ht.Holiday BETWEEN CAST(fc.LeadEntryDate AS DATE) AND CAST(fcd.FirstCallTime AS DATE)) AS FirstCallAgeExcludingHolidays,
        DATEDIFF(SECOND, fc.LeadEntryDate, fc.FirstAnsweredTime) -
            (SELECT COUNT(*) * 24 * 60 * 60 
             FROM HolidayTable ht
             WHERE ht.Division = fc.Division 
               AND ht.Holiday BETWEEN CAST(fc.LeadEntryDate AS DATE) AND CAST(fc.FirstAnsweredTime AS DATE)) AS AnsweredAgeExcludingHolidays
    FROM FilteredCalls fc
    LEFT JOIN FirstCallDetails fcd ON fc.LeadID = fcd.LeadID
),

FinalAgg AS (
    SELECT 
        LeadID,
        CustomerID,
        CleanedPhone,
        Division,
        LeadEntryDate,
        MIN(CallDateTime) AS FirstCallTime,
        MAX(FirstAnsweredTime) AS FirstAnsweredTime,
        MAX(FirstCallType) AS FirstCallType,
        MAX(FirstCallContactID) AS FirstCallContactID,
        ContactBucket,
        SUM(CountableCall) AS CallsInBucket,
        MAX(AnsweredAgeIncludingHolidays) AS AnsweredAgeIncludingHolidays,
        MAX(AnsweredAgeExcludingHolidays) AS AnsweredAgeExcludingHolidays,
        MAX(FirstCallAgeIncludingHolidays) AS FirstCallAgeIncludingHolidays,
        MAX(FirstCallAgeExcludingHolidays) AS FirstCallAgeExcludingHolidays
    FROM FilteredCallsWithHoliday
    GROUP BY 
        LeadID, CustomerID, CleanedPhone, Division, LeadEntryDate, ContactBucket
)

SELECT 
    *,
    CASE 
        WHEN ContactBucket = 'Under24' THEN '< 24 hrs'
        WHEN ContactBucket = '24to48' THEN '24-48 hrs'
        WHEN ContactBucket = '48to72' THEN '48-72 hrs'
        WHEN ContactBucket = 'Over72' THEN '4+ days'
        ELSE 'No Answered Call'
    END AS FirstContactTimeBucket
FROM FinalAgg
ORDER BY LeadEntryDate;
